title: Learn About Early Bound Plugin Classes in Dynamics 365
author: iFox Consultancy
shortDescription: Understand how Early Bound classes work in Dynamics 365 plugins and learn how to generate and use them with XrmToolBox for strongly typed and maintainable code.

title: Automatic Attendance Status Update in Dynamics 365 Using Plugin
author: iFox Consultancy
shortDescription: Automatically update student attendance status as Present or Absent using a Dynamics 365 plugin based on whether the Out Time field is filled or not.

title: Simplifying Case Resolution in Microsoft Dynamics 365 with a Custom Resolve Case Button
author: iFox Consultancy
shortDescription: Learn how to simplify case resolution in Dynamics 365 by creating a custom Resolve Case button using Ribbon Workbench and JavaScript. This customization removes the default popup and allows support agents to resolve cases faster.

title: Dynamics 365 CRM + Copilot: Small Feature, Big Impact
author: iFox Consultancy
shortDescription: Copilot in Dynamics 365 Sales reduces manual CRM work by generating emails, summarizing meetings, and suggesting next actions — helping sales teams focus on selling instead of data entry.

title: Real-Time Conversation Intelligence in Dynamics 365
author: iFox Consultancy
shortDescription: Built-in conversation intelligence analyzes calls for sentiment, keywords, and competitor mentions, providing deeper visibility into customer interactions.

title: Meeting & Call Summarization with Dynamics 365 Copilot
author: iFox Consultancy
shortDescription: Copilot summarizes Teams meetings and sales calls directly inside Dynamics 365, capturing key discussion points, action items, and follow-ups automatically.

title: Next-Best Action Recommendations in Dynamics 365
author: iFox Consultancy
shortDescription: AI-driven next-best action recommendations guide sellers on what to do next, helping accelerate deal progression and improve win rates.

title: Natural Language Record Updates in Dynamics 365
author: iFox Consultancy
shortDescription: Users can update CRM records using conversational prompts with Copilot, reducing manual form entry and improving user productivity.

title: Opportunity & Pipeline Insights with AI
author: iFox Consultancy
shortDescription: Enhanced pipeline intelligence highlights deal risks, engagement gaps, and revenue forecasts to help sales leaders make data-driven decisions.

title: Automated Lead Qualification Using AI
author: iFox Consultancy
shortDescription: AI analyzes engagement signals and behaviors to prioritize high-quality leads, helping sales teams focus on prospects most likely to convert.

title: AI-Enhanced Sales Forecasting in Dynamics 365
author: iFox Consultancy
shortDescription: AI-powered forecasting improves revenue predictions by analyzing historical performance, pipeline health, and seller activity patterns.

title: Embedded Copilot Chat Experience in Dynamics 365
author: iFox Consultancy
shortDescription: Copilot is deeply embedded within Dynamics 365, allowing users to ask questions, retrieve insights, and perform actions without leaving the CRM.

title: Customer Service Case Summaries with Copilot
author: iFox Consultancy
shortDescription: Copilot automatically generates case summaries and recommended responses, helping service agents resolve issues faster and more consistently.
